title: AEGIS RAG Security Lab
summary: Secure RAG architecture lab focused on retrieval design, prompt injection risk, governance, monitoring, and adversarial evaluation.

logs.title: Implemented baseline retrieval direction
logs.details: Established the first retrieval layer direction and separated baseline implementation from later threat modeling and security-control phases.

logs.title: Planning next retrieval and security architecture phase
logs.details: Reviewing retrieval methods, security risk separation, and how keyword, semantic, and graph retrieval layers affect attack surface and control design.
